query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       CASE WHEN p.productCode LIKE 'RESTORED-%' THEN 'restored' ELSE 'normal' END AS source_type,
       COUNT(*) AS missing_events,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p.importedCategoryName IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_imported_category,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p.importedBrandName IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_imported_brand,
       SUM(CASE WHEN p.categoryId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_category_id
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.stationCode = 'B'
  AND se.businessDate IN ('2026-05-07', '2026-05-08')
  AND psd.id IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), CASE WHEN p.productCode LIKE 'RESTORED-%' THEN 'restored' ELSE 'normal' END
ORDER BY business_date DESC, source_type;
